# AllRails Full Site Guide

> AllRails is a universal payment link platform that gives users one link for every payment method. Creators, freelancers, and businesses can share a single AllRails URL and let payers choose Venmo, Cash App, PayPal, or Apple Pay. AllRails is free forever, has no setup fees, and is built by The Bot Collective.

## Homepage

### Brand

AllRails

### Hero

One Link.

Every Payment.

Connecting Payments, Seamlessly. Share a single link and let anyone pay you with their preferred method.

Primary actions:

- Create Your Link — Free
- How It Works

### Example Payment Page Preview

- @danielpays
- Send me money
- Venmo
- Cash App
- PayPal
- Apple Pay
- Powered by AllRails

### How It Works

#### Step 1

Create Your Link

Sign up and pick your unique username — `allrails.app/you`

#### Step 2

Add Payment Methods

Connect Venmo, Cash App, PayPal, Apple Pay, crypto — whatever you use

#### Step 3

Share & Get Paid

One link in your bio, texts, or QR code. Anyone can pay you instantly

### Call To Action

Ready to simplify payments?

Free forever. Set up in 30 seconds.

Action:

- Get Your Link

### Footer

AllRails. All rights reserved.

## Register Page

### Heading

Create your account

Get your payment link in 30 seconds

### Form Fields

- Name
- Email
- Password

### Actions

- Create Account
- Log in

## Public Payment Page

### Dynamic Content

Each public page uses the route `https://allrails.app/p/{username}` and can include:

- Display name or username
- `@username`
- Bio
- Payment method buttons

Supported payment method labels surfaced in the product:

- Venmo
- Cash App
- PayPal
- Apple Pay

For some methods the page can show:

- Handle or address
- Copy button
- Powered by AllRails

### Empty State

No payment methods set up yet.

### Not Found State

Page not found

This AllRails link does not exist yet.

Action:

- Claim this username
